overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating coastal waters at night. The scene features operational navigation displays including radar, chart plotter, and depth sounder, with the ship's bow visible moving through dark waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with forward deck view

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel's navigation systems while cruising through dark coastal waters, monitoring radar and chart displays

entered.detail: Navigation display showing nautical chart with green landmass and blue water areas
Circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep arm showing surrounding contacts and range rings
Depth sounder display showing underwater topography profile in blue
The forward deck of the ship with safety railings and deck lighting visible through the bridge windows
Metal safety railing along the port side of the forecastle deck
Metal safety railing along the starboard side of the forecastle deck

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a ship's navigation bridge at night, looking forward over the vessel's bow. Three illuminated monitors display navigation data: a chart plotter on the left, a rotating radar in the center, and a depth sounder on the right. The ship cruises steadily through dark waters, with the deck railings and forward structure visible through the front windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from the bridge of a vessel as it navigates through a dark nocturnal seascape. It begins with a view looking forward over the ship's bow, where the dark waters stretch toward the horizon. The camera's focus is framed by the interior of the navigation bridge, highlighting three illuminated monitors that display a chart plotter, a rotating radar, and a depth sounder. As the ship cruises steadily, the glow of the screens contrasts with the deep shadows of the deck railings and forward structure visible through the front windows.
